chapter_1.action: [Scene: Talent Agency - Meeting Room]
Aya: (I wonder why they called an emergency meeting here today... Has something happened...?)
Agency Staff A: Well we have to get them to understand our position, otherwise...
Agency Staff B: Are you sure everything's ready for the shoot tomorrow?
Aya: (Everyone's always in such a rush here...)
Chisato: Good morning. Sorry I'm late, my last appointment ran over...
Aya: Good morning! (That's... Chisato Shirasagi? She never usually comes to the office... I wonder why she's here.)
Eve: Good morning! I heard there was a conclave today, so I came to join in!
Aya: A conclave...?!
Eve: I mean... a meeting! Are you here for the meeting, too?
Aya: Me...? I'm-
Agency Staff C: We'd like to start, if everyone's arrived?
Agency Staff C: It looks like we're still one short.
Aya: Excuse me...! Are all of us here for the same meeting today?
Agency Staff C: Yes, you are.
Hina: Huh. I heard there was some kind of meeting today? Or did I get mixed up?
Staff: Hikawa-san... It is today. You're just late.
Hina: Oh, right. So I guess that means everyone else is here already? Well let's get started, then!
Aya: (Strange girl... What kind of meeting could we possibly be here for...?)

Staff: ... Ahem. Aya Maruyama, Chisato Shirasagi, Hina Hikawa, and Eve Wakamiya. You have all been gathered today for an announcement. The four of you will be making your idol debut, as the girl group "Pastel✽Palettes."
Aya: Idol debut?! Really? Honestly?
Staff: Honestly! Aya-san, I want you to use everything you have learned in your time training with us, and do your very best!
Aya: I will! Thank you so much! (This is my third year training to be an idol... I was just about graduate, too... After waiting so long, my time has finally come!)
Eve: Idol... You mean, I'll be singing and dancing? All this time modeling, I was just standing still while people took photos of me... But now I can be active and move around! This is so exciting!
Staff: As this is the first time you are all meeting each other as Pastel✽Palettes, let's go around and make some quick introductions. Starting with you, Aya-san.

Aya: O-okay! I'm Aya Maruyama! I've been in training here at this agency for a while now... And, umm... Oh, my dream! It's been my dream to become an idol since I was a little girl. I couldn't be happier! I'm going to give it 110%, and I won't let you down!
Eve: My name is Eve Wakamiya! Until today, I used to work as a model. I don't know much about being an idol... ... But I'll do my best, in the spirits of bushido!
Aya: B-bushido...?!
Hina: Haha! She's an interesting one, this girl!
Eve: Thank you very much!
Hina: I mean, that wasn't really a compliment.

Chisato: ... Should I go next? I'm Chisato Shirasagi. I've been in TV shows and movies since I was a young child. I may have a lot of experience in entertainment, but this will be my first time being an idol. I hope we can all work well together.

Hina: Does that mean I'm last? The name's Hina Hikawa! But you can call me Hina. I joined this, I dunno, band audition thing? And I can guess I passed. I mean, no one else was as good as me anyway. It was easy really.
Aya: You entered a band audition? But... how did you end up in an idol group?
Hina: Band, group, idol, whatever really. I don't mind where I go, you know?
Chisato: You must be in the backup band, I suppose?
Hina: What? Wait, aren't we all playing instruments?
Eve: Idols just sing and dance, don't they? Do we really have to play instruments, too?
Staff: Ah, right, perhaps I should have been more clear. You will in fact be debuting as an "idol band."
Aya: Idol...
Chisato: Band...?

Staff: Yes. Your first performance will be in two weeks. Oh, and don't worry about the instruments. There'll be professionals playing the real music out of sight, and you four can just pretend to play along.
Aya: Pretend...?
Eve: But doesn't that mean we'll be lying to the audience? That's not very bushido!
Aya: I mean, I don't know how to play anything, but... I think I agree with Eve-chan. I think we should learn to play our instruments, and give people a real show with our own music...!

Chisato: The thing is though, people don't come to see idols for their musical talent. Instead of wasting time learning instruments, we should probably spend more time on ourselves, and on our appearances... ... At least, that's what I think. Count me in for the pretending ♪
Aya: B-but that's...
Staff: Now that's a pro. I knew you'd understand! Thanks for helping to explain, Chisato-san. We'll be proceeding just as she said
Eve: ...
Hina: But see, I can actually play. Unlike the rest of you. ... Whatever, though. This sounds kinda fun too. What instruments will everyone be pretending with, then?
Staff: Ah, of course. I have the list right here. Aya-san, you will be on vocals.
Aya: Me...?!
Chisato: ...
Staff: I mean, it'll all be prerecorded anyway. I'll send you the recording schedule later today.
Aya: ... Okay.
Staff: As for everyone else... Hina-san on guitar, Chisato-san on bass, and Eve will be on keyboard. We're still searching for a suitable drummer.
Chisato: ... Bass, huh. I don't know much about being in a band, but I do know the bassist is a real unsung hero type. Well, I'll give it my best!
Staff: Fantastic. Then let's move on to the finer details of your upcoming performance. If you could turn to page five...
Aya: (Vocalist of Pastel✽Palettes... But I'll never sing a note. Is this really okay...?)

chapter_2.action: [Scene: Talent Agency - Meeting Room]
Staff: ... And that's about everything. Does anyone have any questions?
Chisato: Do we know when the new drummer is going to be announced?

Staff: The issue we are facing is that good drumming is hard to fake. We need to find someone who can actually play, but it is proving difficult. We will do everything we can to find someone this week, but... Until then, we'll have to have someone from our support staff fill in instead. Yamato-san!
Maya: H-hello! My name is Maya Yamato. I'll only be here for a short while, but I'll try to do my best!
The Other Members: Nice to meet you, Maya!
Chisato: Well let's hope we find that new member soon, then.
Staff: I'll be sure to let you all know once we do. ... That's about it for today, then. Thank you for coming, everyone.
All Five: Thank you, too.
Chisato: I've got another appointment right after this, so I'll see you all again soon.
Maya: I've also got rehearsals to get to. Sorry to introduce myself and leave like this. See you!
Aya: (... I've wanted to be an idol for so long. My big break is here, but why am I not excited? Three years waiting for this very moment...)
Eve: ... We're in a band. But we don't play instruments. Why not? I don't understand it...!
Hina: It's going to be tough selling a lie like this... But if we're gonna do it, we should do it well, right? At least, that's what I think.
Eve: Do it well...?
Hina: Do it perfectly! So perfectly that no one could ever tell we're faking it. As long as we fake it perfectly, it'll be like it's really happening.
Eve: Mmm... I don't think I...
Hina: We just have to stick with it! Before you know it, it'll become a truth like any other. Get it?
Eve: Stick with it... Okay! I understand! Bushido is all about choosing a path and sticking to it. I just have to think of our performances like bushido!
Hina: Yeah, that's it! Like bushido! Haha.
Eve: Okay! I think I can do it!

Aya: Stick with it... (Pastel✽Palettes is my first real shot... And after these three years, it's also my last. Whatever happens, I just have to stick with it.) (... Even if it means I just pretend to sing up there.)
Hina: I mean, a band that doesn't actually play instruments? Doesn't that sound super interesting to you? We've gotta look at it positively. It's exciting!
Aya: ... You're right. We have to be positive.
Hina: That's the spirit. We're all in this together, right? ... Ahh. I should be heading off too. Bye guys.
Eve: I think I'll go home too! Goodbye!
Aya: Goodbye! Have to be positive...
[Scene: Hallway]
Hina: Hey! Chisato-chan, was it? Looking forward to working with you ♪
Chisato: Yes, me too.
Hina: I've seen you on TV before, you know. I can't believe we've got a celebrity in the band.

Chisato: Fufu. Still, I don't know anything about being an idol. I've got a lot to learn, too. I don't even know why I was chosen to join, to be honest... All I know is, there must be a reason they wanted me in the band. I just want to do my best in whatever job they gave me.
Hina: Huh...
Chisato: What is it? Did I say something wrong?

Hina: You've got all this experience, and you said all those things in that meeting today, but... I thought maybe you might be just as unsure as the rest of us. Well, either, way let's all do our best♪ See ya.
Chisato: ... I just want to succeed. That's all.
[Scene: One Week Later]
Coach: That's all for today's class. Good job everyone.
All Except Chisato: Thank you!
[Scene: Reharsal Studio]
Hina: Phew, I'm beat! No one said we'd be practicing non-stop like this! I mean we're not even gonna be playing onstage.
Aya: (We've had music practice every day since the band was formed. But the teachers don't seem to be too interested in our progress. Maybe because we'll just be faking it in the end...?)
Chisato: ... Hi everyone! Sorry I wasn't in practice today, my last appointment ran over...

Aya: (Most of us have started to make friends over this past week, except for Chisato-chan. I don't know if she just doesn't care, but she hardly ever even turns up to music classes.) I hope we can do this...
Eve: Wow~, you really know a lot about music, Maya-san!
Maya: Aw, you're too kind. I'm just glad I've found someone to listen to me ramble on like this...
Hina: Hey come on, Maya-chan. Your music talk is really interesting, you know. That stuff about voltages the other day, I was hooked!
Maya: What, really?! You enjoyed all that?! I'm so happy to hear it~!!
Hina: ... It kinda makes me sad, actually. It's a shame someone as cool and interesting as you is only with us temporarily...
Eve: Have they still not found a drummer?
Aya: It's been a week already. We can't keep asking Maya-chan to fill in like this...
Eve: If we can't find a drummer, then... We can't do our show, can we? What will happen to us then...?
Aya: D-don't worry about it! I bet they're searching for someone right now, as we speak!
Chisato: ... You are a really good drummer, Maya-san. How long have you been playing?
Maya: Umm... About 5 years now, I think... I only started working for this talent agency recently, though...
Chisato: Are you looking to become a musician yourself one day?
Maya: Well... either that or an engineer.
Chisato: I see... Just one more thing. Could you take off your glasses for me?
[Scene: Meeting Room]
Maya: U-umm... L-like this...?
Chisato: ... Yes. Just as I thought. You're beautiful. Maya-san... Will you join Pastel✽Palettes?

chapter_3.action: [Scene: Talent Agency - Meeting Room]
Maya: Me? An idol?! No way no way no way! I'm just some studio musician...!
Chisato: You'll be fine. Without those glasses, you look just the part... and you have a musical skill we really need right now.
Aya: Ch-Chisato-chan...! Don't you think we should check with the agency first...?
Hina: I don't~. It would be much more fun to just let Maya-chan join instead. Count me in.
Aya: Fun...? But that's not...!
Maya: No, I mean like really, I can't do this! I'm really sorry, but... I'm not the type to get out there in front of people...! Let alone dance around like an idol...!

Chisato: Maya-san, please! The four of us have been asked to start an idol band with no knowledge of music and one member short... If we can't find our fifth member, we might not even be able to make our debut... and then who knows what'll happen to us...? You joining the band would solve all of our problems... I know I'm asking the impossible of you, and I'm sorry. But you're our-
Maya: Ahh, no, please! Don't apologize... It's just, I just... Me? An idol...?
Eve: Please, Maya-san!
Maya: ...!
Chisato: Eve-chan...

Eve: Please... help us! I really want to perform for everyone up on stage...! And... I want to perform with you, Maya-san. I really like you and all the interesting things you've taught me. I don't want to say goodbye...
Hina: I wanna hear more of your interesting chats too, Maya-chan.
Chisato: Maya-san, please...! She can stay, right Aya-chan?
Aya: I mean, I would love for her to stay with us, but...

Maya: There are  so many other drummers out there, I... ... I've never had anyone rely on me like this before... I'm starting to get all emotional over here... Haha. ... Honestly, I really don't think I can cut it as an idol. I'm really not sure about any of this, but... I mean, if you'll have me... I'd love to be the Pastel✽Palettes' drummer.
Eve: Maya-san...! Thank you so much!
Chisato: Thank you, thank you! Really, really... thank you!
Staff: ... And so allow me reintroduce Maya Yamato-san as the newest member of Pastel✽Palettes.
Chisato: We wanted to help out with your search, so we spoke to Maya-san ourselves yesterday. I'm sorry if we stepped on anyone's toes, but...
Staff: No, not at all~! You really helped us out there, Chisato-san! We were in some trouble, we couldn't find anyone at all...!

Chisato: We explained a little about the band before, but I'm sure the staff here will be able to fill you in on all the details. Now that you're an official member, perhaps you could give another quick introduction...?
Maya: Oh, yeah! Erm, I'm Maya Yamato. You can rearrange the letters in my name and make Maya Yamato again. And... I'm gonna try my best drumming!
Eve: I'm so glad you decided to join us, Maya-san!
Maya: Huhehe...
Chisato: We're all here today to try on our new outfits. Since you'll be wearing one too now, Maya-chan, will you come and join us?
[Scene: Talent Agency]
Staff: Here are all of your outfits.
Aya: Wow, they're so cute!
Eve: They're all so wonderful and sparkly!
Chisato: Will you be able to have Maya-san's outfit made in time?
Staff: If we start on it right away, we should have it ready, yes. If you could come this way for fitting please, Maya-san. The rest of you can try them on!
Everyone Except Chisato: Okay!
[Scene: Rehearsal Studio]
Hina: Tada~! Well? How do I look?
Aya: Wow...! Hina-chan, you look adorable! So cute!
Eve: You look great too, Aya-san! All pink and fluffy... like a macaron!
Aya: Really? Hehehe. It's been my dream to wear an outfit like this, ever since I started training here... I'm so happy right now...!
Chisato: Excuse me? It's a little loose under the arm here... and do you think you could bring the skirt in a little shorter, perhaps?
Staff: Certainly. Is there anything else?
Chisato: Hmm... I'd like to see how it feels while holding the bass. Do you think you could bring one for me?
Staff: Of course. Just one moment.
Chisato: How are all of your outfits?
Hina: I just love mine! It fits me just perfectly~, fufu.
Chisato: Is there anything that needs fixing up? You can tell the staff here and they'll make adjustments.
Hina: Oh~, is that why we're here doing this today?

Chisato: I guess you're not quite used to this world yet, Hina-chan... I should have explained everything before we started. These costumes have already been made up in each of our sizes, so now we try them on and see how they feel. If there are any size problems, or it feels difficult to move in some places, you tell a staff member and they get it fixed.
Eve: You mean these were made just for us...? That's amazing! It's so different to all of my modeling work... A whole new experience.
Chisato: You used to model for magazines, right Eve-chan? Making your given outfit look as best as possible is true for both idols and models.
Eve: Hmm~, I see! I think you're right, Chisato-san! Mmm~, I feel like I can do anything wearing this outfit!
Hina: That's it, I can see your eyes lighting up! We can do this~! I mean, except for the playing any instruments part.
Maya: ...?! H-hey, stop that, it tickles...! Huhe... huhehe...! S-somebody help me~!
Aya: Is Maya-chan okay, do you think...?
Hina: Who knows? I don't even know what they're doing back there.

chapter_4.action: [Scene: Debut Live Performance]
Staff: Is the set ready yet? All finished!
Hina: Wow~! Look at all these people.
Chisato: How many people are in the audience today?
Staff: We estimate it's somewhere around 10,000.
Maya: T-ten thousand...?!
Hina: That's a lot of people~. Funny how we've gotta get up there and make them all believe we're actually performing, right?
Aya: ...
Eve: Are you nervous, Aya-san?
Aya: Ah? Wh-what?! I... Oh no... I've completely forgotten what I was going to say out there...
Hina: Can't you just kinda make it up as you go along?
Aya: I have to think an plan these things, or I just close up when the time comes...! It's all just so much bigger than when I was in training... I'm feeling so nervous...
Chisato: Clam down, now. You are not that trainee any more. You are Aya-chan, from Pastel✽Palettes. A whole new you.

Aya: Y-yeah... You're right...! (I am Aya, from Pastel✽Palettes. I am not the same person I once used to be.) (I've been practicing stage patter for three years now. I don't even have to sing, but I've learned every lyric we have. Nothing can go wrong...!
Event Staff: Pastel✽Palettes, you're up next! Please come up and wait backstage.
All Five: Okay!
[Scene: Dressing Room]
MC: Please welcome to the stage, here for their debut performance, the latest and greatest new idol band, Pastel✽Palettes!
Audience Member: Is that the child actor, Chisato Shirasagi?
Audience Member: Oh yeah, it is!

Aya: ... Hello everyone~! We are Pastel✽Palettes! Thank you so much for coming out to see us today ♪ I think you'll get to know us best of all if we just go ahead and play for you! Here is "Shuwarin☆Dreaming"! (... I got it out okay!) ~~♪
Audience Member: Wow, they're pretty cute!
Audience Member: Are they performing live up there?!
Audience Member: Whoa! That's pretty impressive for an idol group~!
Aya: (Ah...?! The music cut out...?!)
Eve: The sound...?
Chisato: (There's no sound...?! What do we do now?!)
Audience Member: Hey, the music stopped!
Audience Member: Must be technical difficulties, I guess.
Aya: (I... I have to do something...!) .....!
Audience Member: Was she lip-syncing the whole time?
Audience Member: I don't think they were playing their instruments, either!
Audience Member: What happened to the music?
Aya: (Oh no... I know I have to do something, but... I can't make a sound...!) Ah... Ah...!

Chisato: (This isn't good at all... I'm sorry, everyone. It seems like due to some technical difficulties, we won't be able to continue our performance today. We have many more shows planned out for the near future and I hope you'll be back to see them. We have been Pastel✽Palettes!
Audience Member: What's going on here?!
Audience Member: Is that it?!
Eve: Is that the end of the show?
Hina: ... I guess it has to be. Let's get out of here.
Maya: O-okay...!
Aya: ...
[Scene: Onstage]
Eve: What happened out there? I couldn't hear the music at all. It was like we stopped performing!
Staff: We're looking into the problem right now... Ah, hello? Yes, I'm backstage at the moment...
Hina: I can't believe this would happen to us. I mean, I actually did not imagine it.
Chisato: ... We just lied to ten thousand people and they all found out within minutes.
Maya: ...
Eve: We lied...
Aya: ... But, then... ... What do we do now...?

chapter_5.action: [Scene: Dressing Room]
Eve: I wonder what happened. The music stopped and I couldn't hear anything... The whole audience looked puzzled.
Maya: Sounded like a fault to me... The lights didn't go out, which means it was either the speakers, amps or transformers...
Aya: I'm sorry, everyone... I knew I had to do something, but I couldn't make a sound up there...
Maya: It's not your fault, Aya-san...! And there's no use crying over spilt milk, anyway. We've just gotta make the next show even better!
Chisato: ... The next show...
Eve: Next... I wonder what will happen to us next... Do you think this is the end for us already...?
Chisato: I'm going to ask the staff what's going on.
Aya: I want to go too! I want to apologize to them...

Chisato: I know how you feel, Aya-chan... but I'm sure the staff are all very busy right now. If too many of us go out there, they'll start to lose focus on the real problem at hand. Just wait back here for now.
Aya: Okay...
Eve: Is that all we can do right now? Just wait? I want to try to help...
Hina: I just want to find out what's happening. I'm not trying to be all negative like Eve-chan here, I just can't stand sitting around, is all.

Aya: ... (My big chance up on stage... And all the music stopped...) Ah... Ah...! (I can't make a sound...!) (I knew I couldn't let us fail. So why couldn't I do anything to stop it?) (If it was one of my training lessons, I'd know I had to do whatever it took, and I'd take the right action and turn it all around...!) ... I'm just a fool...
[Scene: Offstage]

Chisato: (If we keep having mistakes like this, this band has no future at all. Worse, I'll start getting bad press for it myself. (How can I turn this around...? What can I do to make things right again...?) (I'll never get the chance as long as I'm still here. Which means there's only one thing I can do...) (Choose a path of zero failure.)
Staff: Chisato-san! I was just about to come and see you. I wanted to apologize for the problems around today's performance.
Chisato: I'm sure you must be very busy, but do you think you would be able to explain to me what exactly it was that went wrong?
Staff: Of course. The first problem happened when...
[Scene: Dressing Room]
Aya: Chisato-chan's taking a long time out there... What if there was another issue or something...?
Eve: It is a little worrying.
Hina: Ah~, I'm so bored! I can't take it any more. I'm gonna go see if I can find her.
Aya: Ah, Hina-chan!
[Scene: Offstage]
Hina: Where could Chisato-chan be...? Hmm? Is that her there? With a member of staff...?
Staff: Very well. Understood...
Chisato: ... Thank you. I'll go and tell the other members right away.
Hina: Chisato-chan! You were taking so long, I thought I'd come and find you~. What were you talking about?
Chisato: Oh, Hina-chan. I'm sorry, you must have been worried. I was just having the staff here explain to me exactly what went wrong today.
Hina: Oh, right. All I know is, the other girls are all looking pretty unnerved right now.

Chisato: Of course, it was a big problem we faced today. But I need you all to grow stronger from experiences like these. ... So strong that you won't even need me around. However much more experienced I am, there's still a limit to what I can do, after all.
Hina: So strong we won't even need you...
[Scene: Dressing Room]
Chisato: I'm sorry I took so long, everyone.
Aya: Chisato-chan!
Maya: What did the staff have to say?
Chisato: It was just as you said, Maya-chan. They are still looking into the details, though.
Eve: ... Do you know what will happen to us?
Chisato: They want to talk to us about the band again tomorrow.
Aya: Oh... Is there anything we can do in the meantime...?
Chisato: The staff are all working as hard as they can to fix this. Today's problems hit very hard, there's no doubt about that... but we just need to trust them.
Eve: Yes... I learned to trust in people through bushido. Now is the time for me to put it to use.
Hina: Maybe I should learn some of this bushido, too.
Aya: ... (Trust... I'm not even sure what I should trust in any more...)

chapter_6.action: [Scene: The Next Day]
Hina: Good morning~.
Aya, Eve, Maya: Good morning.
Hina: Hmm. That was low. It feels low in here.
Chisato: I'm not surprised, after everything that happened yesterday.
Staff: Good morning! Are we all here?
Chisato: We're here.

Staff: I would like to start off by sincerely apologizing for what happened yesterday, and for putting you all in this awful position. I'm sure Chisato-san explained the problem to you already, and I can assure you that our specialists are looking into the details as we speak.
Chisato: As for today, our schedule says we have three interviews and a radio recording. Will these be going ahead as planned?
Staff: ... All appointments have been canceled.
All Five: What...?!
Chisato: ... You mean, just today's appointments?
Staff: All appointments... for the foreseeable future. Considering the events of yesterday, it was decided by the management staff here that you all stay out of the media spotlight for now.
Aya: For now...? So we're not splitting up, then? We'll be able to step back out on stage again some day? Or... or...?

Staff: ... All I can say is that no decision has yet been made. In the meantime, I need you all to begin music practice as soon as possible. After yesterday's problems, it has become apparent that you must at least be able to play, for real, all of the songs we currently have.

Eve: No decision... So it might be over, or it might not be over...? But we still need to take music lessons? I don't think I understand... You told us to forget about playing instruments, but now you want to make us learn them again? That's not what you said before!
Aya: Eve-chan...! Please, relax!
Maya: If we learn to play our instruments, we might be able to play live again... I think we should give it a go.
Eve: ...
Staff: I'll contact you all again with your lesson schedules. We'll speak again soon.
Eve: ... So many things are going on, I'm all in a panic. Are we going to be okay?
Chisato: I understand how you feel. This is a lot to take in. But let's just calm down and follow the staff's instructions.
Eve: ... Okay.
Aya: ...! What is this...?
Maya: What is it, Aya-san?
Aya: This article...
Hina: Hmm? "Pastel-Colored Failure! Lip-Syncing Pretenders Caught In First Show"...?

Comments: "That vocalist, Aya, she has experience, right?" "As a trainee, sure. Doesn't mean anything." "And she only just got her big break... I wonder what'll happen to poor Aya-chan..." "The bassist is that child actor, Chisato Shirasagi. Trust an experienced girl like her to do this, lol." "Actors gonna act, I guess."
Aya: ...
Chisato: ...
Hina: Wow. Those are some pretty mean comments.
Aya: Hahaha... Pretty mean, yeah.. But they are right, I suppose... I am inexperienced, and I am just pretending...
Eve: Even so, there are nicer ways of saying than this. People shouldn't hurt other people like this!
Chisato: You're right. But that's just how the media is, I'm afraid.
Hina: Every move we make from now on, the media will be writing articles like this about us... and that must be why we're staying out of the spotlight.
Aya: I understand... I was told about all of this in my training. It's okay.

Eve: It's not okay! I... I cannot just let them say these things about us! Aya-san, Hina-san, Maya-san, Chisato-san...! Let's practice and practice and practice until we can get back out performing again!
Hina: Sounds good to me. I was always looking forward to performing on a huge stage somewhere.
Maya: I can't let it end like this either... I made my decision to do what I can to support Pastel✽Palettes as your drummer...
Aya: You guys...! ... Okay! Let's work our absolute hardest... and make ourselves a whole new Pastel✽Palettes!
Eve: Yes!
Aya: (There's no time for me to be standing silent. That time must be spent practicing and improving.)
Hina: A whole new Pastel✽Palettes~... As long as it takes me up on a giant stage, I'm game.
Chisato: I mean... it's a nice dream, but it's not really specific to us as Pastel✽Palettes, is it...?
Hina: Hahaha, don't be so serious~. There's nothing to worry about. I've got nowhere better to be, and you guys seem interesting enough. I'm not going anywhere.
Chisato: Really? Well, that's good. Let's all get through this together, Hina-chan.

chapter_7.action: Aya: I took a few different classes while I was in training, different to these ones we're doing now. Would you all like to try them with me? Things like basic fitness training will really help out a lot playing in the band... and I think we should take whatever chance we get to improve.
Eve: Wow... Like special training! Always looking to improve  yourself is a very important part of bushido! With your help Aya-san, I can get one step closer to bushido!
Maya: We're supposed to be stepping closer to becoming idols, right...?!
Hina: Extra lessons, huh. Sounds good to me. Not that I need any lessons, really, but... I've got nothing better to do!
Maya: I know enough about music, but I still don't know a thing about being an idol, so... Aya-san! Please teach me!
Aya: Okay! Let's all learn together! Chisato-chan, too...
Chisato: I'm sorry, I still have a full schedule of my own. I can't find any time outside of the band classes, I'm afraid.
Eve: I see...

Chisato: I really am sorry. I'll make sure to give my absolute best in the classes we do have together. And I'll try to make time to rehearse myself, too. ... Speaking of which, I do need to get to my next appointment. I'll see you all later.
Maya: Chisato-san is so busy...
Aya: Well, her work is very important to her...
[Scene: Talent Agency - Meeting Room]
Chisato: (I cannot waste my time on projects with no future. That time is much better spent elsewhere, on my real work.) Excuse me. Do you have a moment to talk?
[Scene: Hallway]
Eve: So, what do we do in our special training? ... Ah! I know! I know what we do!
Aya: What? You do...?
Eve: I do, I do! That standing under the waterfall thing...!
Hina: You mean takigyo? Are we really going to be doing that~?
Aya: Of course not!
Eve: Oh, really? So will we be swimming in freezing cold waters instead...?
Maya: That winter bathing thing? I think I saw a special about it on TV once.
Aya: We're not doing that either!
Eve: Really~? So what are we doing, then?
Aya: S-something a lot more normal! We'll start with some fitness training, I think. Running first, then crunches, push-ups, and...
Maya: Wh-what~?! H-hold on, hold on a minute! Is that all really necessary for becoming an idol?
Aya: It is. Singing and dancing for hours on end... It requires a lot of stamina, you know. Playing your drums does tire you out, doesn't it?
Maya: Y-yeah... When you put it like that...
Hina: Hmm. That sounds pretty boring, though. I thought it'd be more, sorta... bopping. More, kinda... boom, pow, bippidy! You know?
Aya: I'm sorry it's not more interesting... but it's hard work that'll bring us results.
Hina: Huh. Hard work. Not in my vocabulary.
Aya: Hmm... Well how about we start with practicing some poses? It's important to have something unique to make us each stand out onstage.
Hina: Okay, that sounds more fun! Give us a demonstration then, Aya-chan. Your boppin' best pose! Ready? 3, 2, 1...!
[Scene: Rehearsal Studio]
Aya: I'm Pastel✽Palettes pretty pink charm, Aya! Hehe ♪
Hina: ...
Maya: ...
Eve: Oh, I think I've seen that stance before in a history book!
Aya: Wh-what?!
Maya: It's a very... unique pose, for sure.
Aya: I-is it no good...?!
Hina: I think I'm gonna do a pose that's absolute not that. That terrible example actually helps a lot, thanks!
Aya: What?! Th-that's just mean~!
Eve: Well I want to do a bushido pose just like yours, Aya-san!
Aya: That is not at all what I was aiming for~!
Hina: Really~? Well what exactly were you going for, then?
Aya: Hmph~! Hina-chan's a meanie!

chapter_8.action: [Scene: Talent Agency - Hallway]
Chisato: I'm sorry to trouble you like this.
Staff: Not at all. Is something the matter?

Chisato: I was wondering if there was any way you could have these media articles about our debut performance taken down. As long as we receive negative attention like that, Pastel✽Palettes will never again be able to step out onto the stage...
Hina: Hmm...? is that Chisato-chan? Chatting with the staff again...?

Staff: At the end of the day, we are just as torn up about this as all of you are. We hope you understand that we are doing everything we can to make things right for the band. ... Sorry, excuse me. Hello? Yes, hi. About the recordings, yes, I was meaning to ask...
Chisato: ...
Hina: Hey~. We keep bumping into each other, huh.
Chisato: Hina-chan... How long were you standing there?
Hina: Mmm, I only just got here. I didn't hear much of what you were talking about.
Chisato: So you did hear a little, then...? I'm sorry. It was quite heavy to hear, I'm sure...

Hina: Don't worry about me, I'm fine. I totally understand what you mean anyway~. I'm not exactly married to the band, either. I'm only here because it seems interesting for now. If it starts getting boring, I'll leave in a second~.
Chisato: What are you talking about, Hina-chan...? I never said anything about-
Hina: Call it intuition or whatever, but I get the feeling that you're looking for other options outside of Pastel✽Palettes recently.
Chisato: Fufu. I don't know what you mean. I'm always going to be a member of Pastel✽Palettes.
Hina: Hmm. If you say so. I gotta get back to training anyway. See you again~.
Chisato: ... (... I suppose she didn't overhear me asking to quit, then... She certainly is sharp, though...)
Staff: ... However, I do think the backlash against you personally will continue for a while... or perhaps even worsen.
Chisato: Worsen...?
Staff: We work for Pastel✽Palettes and will do everything to protect its members. But we cannot do anything for someone who leaves the band.
Chisato: So you're saying I should stay with the band and just take the backlash...?
Staff: At the end of the day, we are just as torn up about this as all of you are. We hope you understand that we are doing everything we can to make things right for the band.
Chisato: (So the only choice I have is to stay with Pastel✽Palettes... This is just awful.)
[Scene: Rehearsal Studio]
Eve: Hah! How about this pose!
Hina: Are you all practicing posing still?
Maya: I had no idea idols had to think up so many poses... I'm learning a lot!
Aya: Hmm... You could try something a little more cute, maybe...? We are idols, after all...
Hina: Do idols have to be cute, though?
Aya: Of course! Idols must be always sparkling, smiling, always smiling and always giving hopes and dreams to all their fans!
Maya: That is pretty much the image I had in my mind, yeah. That's exactly why I didn't think I was right for the part...
Hina: Mmm~... Always sparkling? What does that even mean? And how do you give someone a dream? Is that the kind of idol you wanna be, Aya-chan?
Aya: Y-yeah, it is.
Hina: What kind of dreams will you be giving out?
Aya: Umm... I want people to know that if they work hard, all their dreams will come true... and that they shouldn't ever put themselves down.
Maya: Put themselves down...

Aya: At least, that's what I heard an idol once say on TV when I was young. I used to hide away from the world, thinking I didn't really have any worth... But then I saw this idol saying these things, and... I felt a rush of motivation. And now I want to give that same experience to others. I want to tell them that if even someone like me can have dreams, then surely can anyone, if they are willing to work hard.
Eve: That is... such a lovely dream, Aya-san. You really moved me!
Aya: Hehehe... I feel kind of embarrassed explaining it like this. But I really do believe it. So I'm starting by working to make my own dreams come true.
Hina: Working for your dreams, huh...
Aya: Did I say something strange...?
Hina: No, no. I don't think so. Working... dreaming... Hmm.
Aya: W-well, different people have different dreams, I'm sure! Maybe we should end our posing practice there and move on to some stretches.
Eve: Ooh, a new training regimen! Let's do it!
Maya: No putting yourself down, huh... Yeah. She's right.
Aya: Maya-chan~! Are you okay?
Maya: Oh, yeah! Let's do this new training, then.
Aya: Okay! Here we go!

chapter_9.action: [Scene: A Few Days Later]
Maya: Whew...! Our sound is finally coming together!
Aya: Yeah! And tomorrow we perform for our teacher, right?
Eve: I bet she's going to be really surprised!
Maya: I think so, as long as we do our absolute best.
Eve: Yeah!
[Scene: Talent Agency - Rehearsal Studio]
Teacher: ... That's enough for today. You've all really improved, haven't you?
All Five: Thank you!
Teacher: Your voice carries a lot better now, Aya. I'm amazed how far you've come in such a short time.
Aya: Thank you very much...!
Teacher: Okay then. We'll pick it up again tomorrow.
All Five: See you tomorrow!
Eve: I have never been complimented like that before! Mmm~, I feel so happy!
Maya: If we really improved that much already, I guess it means all that extra practice is paying off.
Aya: Yeah! I think so!
Eve: Will we stay behind today for more special training?
Chisato: ... I'm sorry. I have another appointment to get to. I'll try to make up for it with my own practice at home, though. I'll see you later.
Aya: Chisato-chan has work again today, huh...
Hina: Still, she got the same praise as the rest of us. She must be doing something right.
Maya: I guess, if she's just practicing by herself... Let's get started just the four of us, then.
Eve: Yes, let's do it!
Maya: Today we're focusing on... song arrangement, was it? Let's take a short break first and then we'll begin.
[Scene: The Next Day]
Aya: I-I'm sorry! I came in at the wrong time on the chorus there... Could we try it again...?
Hina: Hey. Why can't you do this right, Aya-chan?
Aya: Umm... Th-that's...

Hina: You've been here a lot longer than us, right? I mean, I'm pretty sure I could have this down in half a day. Chisato-chan's not even coming to these classes and she's doing fine. I wonder why you can't seem to grasp it.
Aya: I'm sorry...
Hina: I'm not angry or anything. I just don't understand, is all. The sound at the bridge goes all vroom-vroom, and then just kinda booms into the chorus, right? If you just think of it that way...
Aya: Vroom-vroom, then boom into the chorus...? I... I'm not sure...
Hina: You feel it boom into the chorus, right?
Aya: I don't even know what you're saying to me~! Can't you make it a little easier to understand...?
Hina: Easier to understand...? I don't know what you mean, I'm explaining it exactly how I feel it...
Maya: I think you two just feel the music in different ways. Everyone has their own way of experiencing these things.
Hina: They do?

Maya: Sure... We've got you, Aya-san, Eve-san, Chisato-san and me, right? That's five different people right there. We all have our own different ways of experiencing things... No two people will be exactly the same. But matching up together, that's what makes a band. I've worked with a lot of different bands, and seeing how each time everyone comes together to form one sound... it's really interesting, I think. There was this one time...
Hina: Aya-chan's just not the same as me...
Maya: ... Ahh, I was just trying to sound all wise... and I got carried away again, didn't I...?! I-I'm sorry... I was speaking way out of line...!
Hina: No, I... I think I understand what you mean. We're all different... Hmm, I see, I see. Aya-chan. Let's try it again from the bridge, shall we?
Aya: Okay...! Thank you!
[Scene: 30 Minutes Later]
Chisato: Hello. Could I speak with you for a moment? I want to talk to you about a gig for Pastel✽Palettes.
Staff: Of course. I see... I think we may be able to attend an event like that, yes.
Chisato: Maybe...? You mean definitely, yes? I've been bringing you potential events for the band, yet you haven't been able to decide on any of them...
Staff: W-we'll talk to the organizers and see if we can't make something happen. I'll be in touch.
Chisato: (... Step by step, I'm getting closer to returning to the stage. I am sure that I have taken the right path.)
[Scene: Meeting Room]
Aya: Maya-chan!
Maya: Aya-san! Great work today.
Aya: You too. I just wanted to say... thank you for today.
Maya: Me? Did I do something worth thanking?

Aya: It was what you said to Hina-chan! That a band is made up of all kinds of different people. Thanks to you, we could get back to practicing again. I just can't talk that... logically? Or I don't know how you'd explain it, but... I thought it was pretty amazing of you. Thank you.
Maya: H-hey, don't worry about it...! If anything, I'm sorry for, y'know... talking all big like that.
Aya: You weren't at all! And anyway, you have far more experience and knowledge than me when it comes to music...
Maya: Aww, come on... I'm just a studio musician, you know...?
Aya: Hahaha. You're too humble! You should have more confidence in yourself, Maya-chan... Not that I'm one to talk, really.
Maya: ...
Aya: Maya-chan? Hello~?
Maya: Huh? Ah! Umm... Thank you! Let's get back to it again tomorrow!
Aya: ...? Yeah, we will!
Maya: Have more confidence, huh... Huhehe...

chapter_10.action: [Scene: A Few Days Later]
Maya: Aya-san, your timing was perfect that time!
Aya: Really? Phew... I'm so glad I practiced~!
Chisato: Hello, everyone.
Aya: Chisato-chan!
Hina: Rare sight to see you here, Chisato-chan.
Chisato: Well I just had to share with you the great news. Take a look at this.
Hina: Fresh♪ Idol Festival Vol. 8...?
Aya: I know this event. Only idols that debuted the last year are allowed to take part, right? A lot of really famous idols caught their big break here. It's a very important event for the industry.
Hina: Wow. You sure know a lot about it. But why are we talking about it right now?
Chisato: Because we are going to be performing at it.
Aya: We are...?! R-really...?!
Chisato: Really. I just heard confirmation from the staff.
Eve: Wow...! That means Pastel✽Palettes is going back up onstage!
Aya: It's thanks to all of our hard work! I'm so glad we spent all this time rehearsing...!
Chisato: ...
Aya: Even our teacher was surprised at how far we've come. It just goes to show how important dedication is...
Chisato: Do you really believe that we got this through hard work and dedication?
Aya: What...?

Chisato: Yes, your teacher is impressed with your improvement. That is no doubt thanks to the great effort you've all put in. But tell me... what part of this is any different to what you already did in training?
Aya: I... That's...

Chisato: You're doing all the same things as last time, but now suddenly you have a live performance lined up. I wonder why what could be. If all it takes effort to get your debut, you'd have graduated a long time ago now, wouldn't you?
Aya: ... But, if I hadn't made any effort at all, then...!
Chisato: Enough with the effort. Enough with the dreams. You know... Dreams don't come true through hard work alone.
Eve: Chisato-san...!
Aya: ... Hahaha... I thought they did. I really thought they did, but... I guess I was wrong.
Maya: ...
Aya: I'm just... some kind of idiot, then... I'm sorry.
Chisato: ... I've got another appointment. Let's give this live performance our all.
Hina: Aya-chan? Are you okay?
Aya: ...
Eve: Is it a bad thing to make an effort? Am I not supposed to have dreams...? None of your hard work has gone to waste, Aya-san. You've worked so hard! It wasn't all for nothing... was it?
Aya: I don't know... I just don't know any more...
Eve: ... Aya-san...
Aya: I wonder... I wonder how dreams really do come true...

chapter_11.action: [Scene: The Next Day]
Aya: ...
Chisato: Dreams don't come true through hard work.
Aya: (... But I don't know of any other way to make a dream come true.)
Eve: Aya-san!
Aya: Eve-chan, Maya-chan... Good morning! I'm so glad you came.
Maya: What Chisato-san said yesterday... I guess it did kind of get us worried, too. But still I think I'd rather do something than nothing.
Eve: I don't want to give up on something I've already started! Following things through is the way of bushido!
Aya: I just didn't know what else to do, and... ended up here.
Hina: Hey, you're all here! I mean, I knew you would be~.
Maya: Hina-san!
Aya: Hina-chan...! You came too! Thank you!

Hina: Yeah, well. There is a reason for that. I don't know about hard work and dreams and all that... I mean, I can do pretty much everything without any effort at all. It's kinda hard for me to understand people who can't, too...
Aya: You're putting it all out there, huh...
Hina: Well, it's the truth. But after hearing Maya-chan say what she said about bands being strangers coming together, I started to think more about "other people." And then...
[Scene: Talent Agency - Rehearsal Studio]
Hina: Everything just got way more exciting! I mean, I really don't know anything about "other people" at all! Especially people like Aya-chan!
Aya: Me...?!
Hina: You always make mistakes in the same places no matter how often you practice, right? But I know I'd be able to do it, so... it makes me think.
Aya: Uuu...

Hina: I keep wondering why you never give up, even though you can't do it right. I wonder what is going on inside your head. And I don't know, but it's interesting! The more I think about it, the more I realize... I really like you, Aya-chan! "Other people" can be pretty interesting! I love it!
Eve: Mmm~? I don't know what you mean, Hina-san.

Hina: Aya-chan is like a kind of uncharted map to me! I just want to explore and get to know her more and more! I think these "other people" are the fuel that keeps me moving. And that makes Aya-chan the biggest source of all.
Aya: I'm your fuel...?
Hina: Exactly. And that's why I'm here, to keep this interesting experience going as long as I can! I don't think I'll ever get tired of these "other people"!
Aya: That's all... really, confusing, but... I'm pretty sure this isn't a compliment, right...?

Hina: Nope! It's not. But you're interesting and I like you! You never give up and you always give it your all, the complete opposite of me. I like that! Of course I like Eve-chan and Maya-chan and even Chisato-chan, too. I mean, who knew "other people" could be this interesting?!
Maya: I feel like I should learn from Aya-san's amazing strength, too. I mean, she's already given me courage...
Aya: Me?

Maya: You said yourself, we should chase our dreams and never put ourselves down. You gave me the courage I needed to believe in myself. Suddenly being asked to join the band like this... I didn't think a studio musician like me could ever become an idol. But all those worries went away thanks to you, Aya-san.
Aya: Maya-chan...!
Maya: I'm here because I believe in those words you spoke, Aya-san. And I don't think hard work is ever a waste!
Eve: I don't believe your hard work is wasted either, Aya-san. I think you are really improving! So let's keep working at it together.
Aya: ... I... I'm so happy to hear that...
Hina: Why are you crying? What's the matter, Aya-chan?
Aya: Uuu... I-I'm sorry... I always cry too easily...! I was just starting to lose hope, but... hearing you all say these wonderful things, I... Waahh~!
Maya: You're the one keeping us all motivated here, Aya-san!
Aya: I-I'm so happy...!
Hina: Oh, erm... I've gotta try to feel how Aya-chan's feeling now, right...? Hmm~... Erm~... Nope. I've got nothing. No idea!
Eve: Aya-san is a bushido warrior. Even warriors get overwhelmed by the kindness of their colleagues. Right, Aya-san?
Aya: Y-yeah... That's right...
Hina: You really are an interesting person, Aya-chan~. ... I took us way off track today, huh. I'm really sorry! Let's get back to practice, shall we?
Eve: Okay! Are you feeling better now, Aya-san?
Aya: Uuu... I think I still have a little more crying to do~!
Hina: All right then. I'm gonna use this chance to see if I can feel what you're going through~. Why, Aya-chan? Why are you crying? What even is this "getting overwhelmed" thing?!
Maya: Ahh...! Hina-san, please, try to ask a little nicer...
Aya: J-just give me a little more time~!

chapter_12.action: [Scene: A Few Days Later]

Aya: (We are getting better at performing, but... I just wish there was something else I could do.) Ah... Ah...! (I can't make a sound...!) (I don't want to stand here doing nothing and just regret it later... I can't have any regrets... Ah, that's it!)
[Scene: Station Entrance]
Aya: Good morning! Do you have a moment?
Staff: Aya-san. Of course. What is it?
Aya: Umm... I was wondering if we could sell tickets to our next event ourselves.
Staff: Sell them yourselves...?
Aya: There are a lot of people out there who wrote us off after our debut show. I was thinking it would be good to have a fresh start and let them get to know us all over again...
Staff: I understand how you feel... however, meeting with fans like that is potentially very dangerous.
Aya: We can cancel the event at the first sign of danger. Please...! I don't want to give up before we even try!
[Scene: Talent Agency - Meeting Room]
Aya: Good morning, everyone! ... I have something to talk to you about.
Eve: Ooh, what is it?
Aya: I talked to the staff this morning and received tickets for our next show! I thought we could go out and sell them to people ourselves.
Hina: Huh. Why, though? Can't they just buy them online?

Aya: We've been stuck inside the studio ever since our debut. I think we should show our faces and talk to our fans... let them get to know us all over again. I want to have a fresh start, and let the people out there see the new us...
Maya: Okay. Now that you mention it, I did know a band that used to hand out their show tickets themselves.
Eve: Let them get to know us... What a lovely idea! I want to go and meet the fans as well!
Hina: Sure, okay. I  guess fans are "other people" too. The more "other people" I can meet, the better.
Aya: Thank you, everyone! Let's start right away, today!
[Scene: Rehearsal Studio]
Eve: Are we going to start here?
Aya: Yeah. Our agency owns this theater here and they said we could give out our tickets outside.
Maya: You really worked hard to get this together, huh Aya-san. Thank you.
Aya: ... Phew... Okay... Hi, everyone~! Pastel✽Palettes are here selling tickets to our next live performance~!
Chisato: (... Is that... the band...?)
Passerby A: Hey, aren't they the girls from Pastel✽Palettes?
Passerby B: The band that got busted lip-syncing?
Passerby A: Yeah, that one. It turned out they weren't even playing their instruments. I'm surprised to see they're still going... I thought they broke up.
Chisato: (... Are they selling their own tickets? She really doesn't give up, that girl...)
Aya: Please come and watch our show ♪
[Scene: Station Entrance]
Maya: Come watch us play!
Eve: You will really enjoy it!
[Scene: One Hour Later]
Hina: Ahh~... I'm so tired~... We barely sold any tickets, too.

Eve: I heard people saying things like "I didn't know they were still around," and "I thought they broke up..." It's so sad. We are all trying our very hardest to perform this new show... but the people have already forgotten us.
Maya: Well we spent all this time avoiding the media spotlight. I guess it makes sense that people would forget about us...
Aya: If they've forgotten us, then we need to make them remember again. At the very least, the people we met today all know that we're back, don't they?
Eve: ... Don't you feel sad, Aya-san? That we've been forgotten.

Aya: ... Of course I do. But I want to do everything that I can to make things right. I won't let sadness overcome me. I won't let it force me to give up. And I won't let it make me regret. Whatever happens, I just want us to get back out onto that stage. ... Anyway, it's time to start our class! Come on guys, let's do this!
[Scene: One Hour Later]
Chisato: ...

chapter_13.action: [Scene: A Few Days Later]
Maya: W-we hope you'll come see us...
Hina: ... How long have we been doing this now?
Eve: Today makes... five days.
Hina: Five days and we've only sold this many...
Aya: Please come and see us~!
Hina: Mm...? Rain...?
Maya: It's really pouring! We've got to pack all this stuff away!
Hina: What? I can't hear you! The rain's too loud!
Eve: That's enough for today! We should go home!
Hina: Okay! Aya-chan! Let's go home!
Aya: Please! Come and see us!
Eve: Aya-san! Let's go!
Aya: I'm going to stay out a little longer. You go on ahead.
Hina: Aya-chan! There's not going to be anyone out here in this weather! And this is no time to be catching a cold!
Aya: I... I have to do it. I just have to. Go on without me.
Eve: Aya-san!
Aya: Please come and watch our show!
Hina: Aya-chan!
Aya: ... Don't stop me... Please.
Eve, Hina, Maya: ...
Hina: ... Let's go.
Aya: I'm here selling tickets! Come and watch Pastel✽Palettes live! (Nobody can hear me through all the rain.) ... P-please! Please!
[Scene: Station Entrance]
Hina: Ahh~, I'm completely soaked through~!
Maya: I'll go get us some towels. ... Oops, sorry! ... Oh, Chisato-san!
Chisato: Hello... Why are you three drenched?
Eve: Chisato-san! We were selling tickets outside by the station. But then it started to rain very heavily...
Chisato: ... Where is Aya-chan?
Eve: Well...
Hina: ... Aya-chan said she had to keep on going, she wouldn't listen to us.
Maya: She said she wanted to do whatever she could. Said she didn't want to have any regrets.
Chisato: So you mean she's still out there selling tickets?
Maya: ... Yes. She was so set on going through with it, it wouldn't have mattered what we said... I'm sorry. We couldn't get her to leave.
Eve: I think Aya-san is feeling a lot of pressure right now. Maybe we should go back to her after all...!
Chisato: ... I think you should leave these matters to the staff. I'll let them know what's going on.
Eve: Chisato-san! Are you leaving...?
Chisato: I'm sorry. I have another appointment. I'll see you all again. (Why... Why do you have to go this far...?)
[Scene: Talent Agency - Meeting Room]

Aya: (I'm an idiot... I should have listened to Hina-chan. No one's going to buy tickets from me in weather like this...) Come see our show... (No one can hear me. Not that it matters, there's no one around to hear me anyway. But I just have to keep trying...) (My hopes, my dreams... I cannot let them get washed away by the rain...) ...
Chisato: ...! Aya-chan... She really is here...!
Aya: Please... come and see our show...
Chisato: Come and watch us perform!
Aya: ... Chisato... chan...?
Chisato: We are selling tickets for the upcoming Pastel✽Palettes live performance. Please come and listen to us play!
Aya: ... But why...?
Chisato: What? Look at all these tickets we still have. You don't want any regrets now, do you?
Aya: ...
Chisato: The rain is just too loud. We'll have to raise our voices higher, so that everyone around can hear us.
Aya: ... Okay!
Chisato: Come and watch Pastel✽Palettes' live show!
Aya: Hear us perform live!
Aya & Chisato: Please come and watch our show!!

chapter_14.action: [Scene: Road to the Agency]
Aya: ... At least the rain has stopped.
Chisato: ...
Aya: Umm... Chisato-chan, why did you...?
Chisato: I came because I can't understand you. I thought that maybe doing something you would do might help that.
Aya: What kind of person do you see me as, Chisato-chan...?

Chisato: In my eyes... Aya Maruyama is... Someone who blindly sprints headfirst towards her dreams. Because that's the only way she knows how to achieve them. She probably knows there are other ways, but still she struggles on with her own methods... In all honesty, just a tactless person.
Aya: You're exactly right...
Chisato: ... But that's what makes you who you are.
Aya: Who I am... Yeah, I think so. I want to become my own kind of idol in my own way. No regrets.
Chisato: ... We're nearly at the agency.
Aya: ... Yeah.
[Scene: Talent Agency - Meeting Room]
Aya & Chisato: Hello.
Hina: Aya-chan! And Chisato-chan, too! You found each other, huh.
Maya: Aya-san, Chisato-san! We're blowing up online!
Aya: What? What's happened now...?!
Eve: Just look at these comments!
Chisato: "I just saw Aya and Chisato from Pastel✽Palettes selling tickets out in the rain. No one was buying, but you've gotta admire their spirit! Maybe I was wrong about them."
Aya: "For real? I had no idea...! Are they gonna be back out there tomorrow? I might go buy a few." "It looks like the Lip✽Syncers are turning things around... What is all this...?
Maya: I guess people saw you selling the tickets out there today and took to the internet to post comments. Thanks to them, Pastel✽Palettes is getting a lot of attention online!
Hina: Look at this one, Aya-chan.

Comments: "Aya-chan has always been a real hard worker, ever since she was a trainee. It's so nice to see her back to her old self again." "If anyone knows how to turn around bad fortune with sheer dedication, it's our Aya-chan!"
Eve: The fans can see how hard you are working, Aya-san! It really was all worth it!
Aya: All my... hard work...
Maya: Your fighting spirit really reached their hearts!
Aya: ...
Maya: Aya-san... a-are you crying again...?!
Aya: Hehehe... I'm sorry. I know I cry too easily... Ah... Ah... Achoo!
Eve: Oh no, Aya-san! Have you caught a cold...?!
Chisato: ... I'll get you a towel.
Hina: I-I'll go too~!
[Scene: Hallway]
Chisato: ... Achoo!
Hina: Hahaha. You caught one too, Chisato-chan?
Chisato: Quite possibly. We should be careful, with the show coming up.
Hina: So why the sudden change of heart? I am really, really interested you know.
Chisato: I was just worried about Aya-chan. That's all.
Hina: And how was she?
Chisato: She was how she always is. I got to experience that first hand this time.
Hina: Just like how you are always how you are, right? Aya-chan isn't you, and you're not her, either! That's what makes "other people" just so interesting.
Chisato: ... Sure. Give this towel to Aya-chan, would you? I have to get going.
Hina: Ah, Chisato-chan!

Chisato: Ah, hello. I'd like to talk about the live event, if possible. Do you have a moment to... achoo! ... I apologize. I had an unexpected appointment earlier today. Something I'm really not used to at... at... achoo! I think my body's just shocked I even went through with it. Fufu. Yes, about the live show...
[Scene: Meeting Room]
Aya: ... Achoo!! Ahh~. I really should pick a sunny day next time... Achoo!

chapter_15.action: [Scene: A Few Days Later]
Chisato: I will leave the seating issue in your hands, then.
Staff: Okay, we'll see what we can do. Really though, Chisato-san, the attention Pastel✽Palettes has been getting recently is incredible!
Chisato: Oh?

Staff: Thanks to you, we've had all kinds of positive responses from people in the industry. All that selling tickets yesterday has really raised the band's profile. We're all so luck to have you in the band, Chisato-san~.
Chisato: ... It was Aya-chan who put in all the work selling tickets yesterday. I didn't do anything at all.
Staff: Oh, don't be so modest. All of the staff and all of your fellow band members should all be so grateful for your help~.
Comments: "Aya-chan has always been a real hard worker, ever since she was a trainee. It's so nice to see her back to her old self again."
Eve: The fans can see how hard you are working, Aya-san! It really was all worth it!
Maya: Your fighting spirit really reached their hearts!
Chisato: ... I'm not the only member of Pastel✽Palettes, you know. ... As I said, please take care of the seating issue.
Staff: Ah, Chisato-san. Where are you going?
Chisato: ... I just remembered I have to be somewhere.
[Scene: Talent Agency - Meeting Room]
Chisato: (What am I doing...? Why would I ever try to protect them like that? I've never even cared about them before.)
Staff: Oh, don't be so modest. All of the staff and all of your fellow band members should all be so grateful for your help~.

Chisato: (Hearing those words made me so angry... Not because the staff are incompetent themselves...) (No... It was the complete disregard for how much effort the other members are all putting in...) ... Maybe I am coming down with something after all.
[Scene: Hallway]
Maya: Aya-san, are you feeling any better?
Aya: I'm fine, thank you! Sorry for making you worry like that.
Hina: Chisato-chan was sneezing the other day too. I wonder if she's okay.
Aya: What? She was?
Hina: I hope she didn't catch a cold~.
Chisato: Hello everyone. Is... this the right place for the extra classes?
The Other Four: ...
Chisato: Oh, are you... not doing any extra classes today, or...?
Aya: N-no, we are! Yeah, we're just about to start!
Hina: You've been acting real strange recently~. Doing all kinds of things the real Chisato-chan would never do~.
Chisato: Well our show is drawing closer. I thought maybe I could improve my performance, too... I'm sorry I couldn't join until now. I hope you you'll all—Kya?!
[Scene: Rehearsal Studio]
Eve: Chisato-san! I know you're really busy, but thank you so much for coming to join us!
Chisato: Eve-chan...! I just...
Eve: This is my hug of true love! Chisato-san~!!
Chisato: Eve-chan... Thank you... but it's a little tight...!
Eve: Ah! Sorry! I was just so happy...
Chisato: Don't worry about it. To be honest, I wasn't expecting such a positive response.

Maya: I'm really glad you came too, Chisato-san. After, you know... everything that happened... I thought you'd probably hate all this. By all this I mean, you know, rehearsals and lessons and... I dunno, I'm sorry... Maybe I just thought wrong, I guess.
Aya: I'm still not sure I understand all the ways you think, Chisato-chan. But I think I'd like to find out. ... Just like how you know exactly who I am.
Chisato: Aya-chan...
Aya: Let's make a whole new start right here, Chisato-chan.
Hina: It's just like my sister told me. Understanding others is the most important thing of all.
Eve: Yeah! There's a saying in bushido, "Samurai look out for one another."
Aya: S-samurai...?
Maya: I'm... not even sure if that applies here or not...
Chisato: Fufufu...! You know some very strange things, Eve-chan.
Eve: I do! Thank you!
Hina: Not a compliment~. Hahaha. Okay, I think it's about time we started practice.
Eve: Okay!
Maya: Chisato-san, we're practicing in parts today. You can join me and we'll get our sounds matched up. I-if you'd like to, that is...?
Chisato: Of course! It would be my honor.

chapter_16.action: [Scene: Walk Home]
Maya: Ah! Chisato-san.
Chisato: Maya-chan, hello. Is something the matter?
Maya: No, I just... I wanted to ask you something...
Chisato: If I hate the idea of putting in effort, you mean?
Maya: ... Yeah.

Chisato: Hmm... I don't think effort is a bad thing. If anything, I always thought it was a given, not something to be especially proud of. What if you believe in effort alone, and then come across true failure? What is there to believe in then?
Maya: Well, so... you want to believe in something more real than effort? Like our staff, the people who support us... They're the ones who really bring our success.
Chisato: ... Aya-chan said she wanted to understand me better, but I don't think she will ever truly understand what we are talking about right now.
Maya: So why have you chosen to believe in effort all of a sudden?
Chisato: I think seeing Aya-chan work so hard made me want to try believing. Believing in hard work.
Maya: Aya-san...
Chisato: ... It's strange. She can't do anything, she's weak on stage, she cries at the drop of a hat, but still...

Maya: Ahaha, Chisato-san, that's a little much... ... But I know I'm only here thanks to Aya-san giving me the courage I needed. Maybe she just has the power to make change in people. Thank you, Chisato-san. I'm glad we had this talk.
Chisato: Me too. I'll see you tomorrow.
Maya: Okay!
[Scene: A Few Days Later]
Chisato: ... I keep saying it, but we really don't have much time left before the show. We should be focusing on what's most important.
Aya: I know, but... I still think we should be finding time to work on our own weak areas, you know...
Chisato: We are a band. Our success is based on the music when it all comes together. We should be doing more practice together...
Hina: Ahh~... There they go again.
Eve: Aya-san and Chisato-san sure do fight a lot... Are they going to be okay?
Maya: Hahaha. Eve-san, they're not fighting.
Eve: They're not? Are they just facing off against each other?
Maya: F-facing off... Sure, that's one way to put it...
Aya: ... Okay. Starting tomorrow, we can try focusing on practicing all together.
Chisato: Thank you, Aya-chan. We'll lose a lot of personal practice time, though. Are you sure?
Aya: Not completely, but... I'll just have to work hard to make myself sure. I'll find my own time for extra practice.
Chisato: Thank you. Let's do everything we can to make this show a success.
Maya: Look at that. Friends again.
Hina: After one talked circles around the other, sure.
Maya: ... I wouldn't call those kind of comments necessary, exactly...
Chisato: Now that we're getting to know each other, I'm starting to realize... I think we've been working toward the same goal this whole time. Goal?

Aya: To get up onto that stage... To get on stage and put on a great performance. I think we have the same goal... but we just chose different paths to get there. But as long as we're heading in the same direction, I think we'll be okay.
Chisato: ...
Aya: I-I'm sorry! I hope I didn't say anything out of line...
Chisato: ... No, no. I'm just glad you finally realized.
Aya: Wh-what?
Chisato: I thought you'd never realize, to be honest. I'm glad.
Aya: That's mean, Chisato-chan...!

Chisato: Fufu. I really am happy, though. We seem to be opposites in so many ways, even getting this heated up over a simple practice schedule. ... But you are exactly right. We are headed in the same direction.
Aya: Chisato-chan...! We can do it! We are going to succeed, I know it!
Chisato: Oh I don't doubt that for a second.
Maya: ... I think, maybe for the first time since we started, Pastel✽Palettes is going to be all right.
Hina: I was just thinking the same thing.
Eve: It's just like they say. Where there's a will, there's a way~.
Maya: Another incredible choice of words, Eve-san.

chapter_17.action: [Scene: A Few Days Later]
Maya: Huhehe~, can you all feel it~? That precious moment the stick first slams into the snare...
Chisato: ... Maya-chan, do you think we could get back to practicing now?
Maya: Ah... Was I doing it again?
Aya: ... You were, a little, yeah.
Maya: Ahh, Chisato-san, I'm sorry~! I always get carried away talking about my instruments...
Chisato: Your knowledge of music is helping us all greatly, Maya-chan. I thank you.
Maya: Ahh... Can't tell if that's sarcastic...
Hina: Haha~. I think she is genuinely grateful, you know.
Maya: Hina-san... Please don't kick a drummer while she's down...
Hina: Hahahaha!
Aya: (There are only a few days left until the show... and the band has never been in better spirits.)
Chisato: I don't think there's ever been an idol so knowledgeable about music. You should really play it up... but maybe lose the "huhehe..."
Maya: Ahh... Aya-san said the same thing once before...
Chisato: We only have a few days left. Maybe we should try practicing some stage patter? If we move around the personal practice schedule a little...
Staff: Hello everyone.
All Five: Hello!
Hina: Has something happened~?

Staff: As the big day draws nearer, I wanted to talk to you all about the upcoming show. With the lessons we've provided, plus all of your own extracurricular practice, you've all really improved dramatically! We are incredibly impressed. And thanks to your efforts selling tickets, your popularity has grown and you have fans out there excited to come and watch.
All Five: Thank you!
Staff: Taking your newfound skills and the expectations of your fans all into consideration... we would very much like you to perform for real this time. Do you think you are ready?
Eve: Wow...! Of course, of course! This is wonderful!
Maya: I'm so glad we all practiced so hard!
Hina: Of course we're ready. That's what we did all this rehearsing for!
Aya: This is perfect...! We'll give it everything we have!
Staff: However... there is just one problem... For the vocals, Aya-san... We would ask that you let us use the recording we prepared before.
Aya: What...? What do you mean...?

Staff: Pastel✽Palettes is receiving a lot of great feedback recently... but we have to remember there will be a lot of other bands' fans at this event. It is not unlikely that some of these others may shout out nasty comments from the crowd, just like at your debut show. Aya-san, you do get the most stage fright of all the members, and we just cannot afford for you to lose your voice again like last time.
Eve: But... she has worked so hard in rehearsals! She put in so much effort!

Chisato: As far as I'm aware, the whole reason we began these lessons in the first place was to allow us to continue performing should the music cut out again, was it not? ... What do you expect us to do if  the vocals cut out again this time?

Staff: There are always risks involved with performing at a live event. It has been decided that Aya-san being able to perform without issue is what is most important for the band. That is what I am here to tell you. ... We took this decision exactly because of how important you all are to us. We really hope you can understand. I'm sorry, Aya-san.
Aya: ...
Hina: Aya-chan...
Aya: ... Please just... give me a moment.
Eve: Ah... Aya-san...!
Chisato: ... Aya-chan needs time to work through this by herself. Let's just leave her be.
Eve: ... Okay...
Chisato: You made this decision to help her perform without issue, and in doing so only created a giant problem for her. Is this some sort of a joke?
Staff: ... I'm sorry.
Chisato: (If you were betrayed by the one thing you believed in... what would you do?)

chapter_18.action: [Scene: Talent Agency]
Aya: ... (I wonder how many times I've been here since joining Pastel✽Palettes... No matter what happens, I'm always here, every day... My home...)
Chisato: I thought you might be here.
Aya: Chisato-chan! But how...?
Chisato: I know you, Aya-chan. I know you'd want to be surrounded by your practice and effort.

Aya: Practice and effort... When I was a trainee, I was in a small idol group. My debut was my dream, and for three years I worked hard at it. But it just didn't go anywhere. I didn't get my debut, but I was forced to graduate... and that's how I joined Pastel✽Palettes.
Chisato: ...

Aya: ... But I was so happy. "My dream has come true," I thought. I put it all down to the efforts I'd made, that they'd come back to me as pure confidence in myself. ... I know I don't really have any talent. That's why I put in the extra word to make up for it and keep myself moving forward. Because... I have no other option. No matter how many times I made a mistake, I didn't give up... I never wanted to give up. ... But... Now they tell me I can't sing at our show. The one thing I believed in, that my efforts would bring success... maybe it wasn't true after all. I feel like everything I've built up to now has all come crumbling down, and... it hurts...
Chisato: ...
Aya: ... What would you do if you were told not to perform? For your career as an idol? Would you just accept it?

Chisato: There are some things that just can't be done with effort alone. That's why I chose to believe in something more... real. If I was told not to sing, that it would help us succeed... I think I probably would accept it.
Aya: ...
Chisato: ... But that's just me. That's what Chisato Shirasagi would do. ... I really thought I understood you, but it looks like I was wrong.
Aya: What...?
Chisato: You told me before you wanted to become your own kind of idol. The Aya Maruyama I know sprints towards her dreams head first. She believes in her efforts, she never gives up...
Aya: My own kind of idol...
Chisato: The only betrayal here would be if you stopped trying. You would be betraying Aya Maruyama. Whatever might come your way... you cannot let that happen.
Chisato: ... That's all I have to say.
Aya: Whatever comes my way... I cannot...
[Scene: Rehearsal Studio]
Eve: Is Aya-san going to be okay...?
Hina: Hmm, I dunno. But I can't imagine Aya-chan ever giving up on anything. Never giving up is her whole thing, isn't it?
Maya: Yeah, it is. Plus she's more of an idol than any of the rest of us, too.
Eve: What do you mean?

Maya: I had no idea what an idol really was. My whole image of them was that they're these sparkling shells of cuteness... But I started to think, what is that sparkle? It's not as simple as just putting on an outfit, I figured that one out when I tried my own on the other day. But Aya-san... Taking lessons together, watching her move, I realized... she really does sparkle.
Eve: Sparkle...

Maya: The way she never backs down from a challenge, chases her dreams with all of her effort, stays true to herself... that's what makes her sparkle. And then it hit me. "Idol" isn't just a music genre, or some kind of celebrity label. It describes a person's entire way of life.
Hina: Their way of life...
Maya: Aya-san sparkles because she chases her dreams without ever giving up. She sparkles so bright, it even rubs off on the people around her... I think that's the kind of idol Aya-san is.
Eve: I am finding it a little hard to follow... but I do know that Aya-san sparkles very brightly.
Maya: You can see it, right? That's why... I really think she's going to be okay.
Hina: Yeah... She will. She'll be all right. I just know she'll come up with an answer to all of this. And it'll be something sparkling.

chapter_19.action: [Scene: Event Day]
Staff: How are the stage preparations? Get me ten copies of the script! Okay!
Maya: Everyone's so busy, rushing around...
Eve: It's almost time for the show! I'm so nervous I could eat a horse!
Maya: Eve-san, are you really sure that's right?
Eve: Yes! Of course!
Hina: Hahaha~. Well I don't know about her, but I'm getting pretty excited~! I'm excited, I'm ready and I'm boppin'!
Maya: Hahaha... Well I'm just plain old nervous, myself... Uuu...
Hina: Don't worry about it! It'll be over before you know it. You've just gotta boom your way out there!
Aya: (It's finally here... and I know exactly what I need to do.)
Staff: Hi everyone. Are we all here?
All Five: Hello!
Chisato: Yes, we're all here.
Staff: Then let's go over the plan for today. Does everyone have their scripts?
Aya: E-excuse me...!
Staff: Yes?
Aya: Umm... I'd like to say something first, if that's okay?
Staff: Of course, go ahead.
Aya: I... I want you to let me sing!
Staff: What...?!

Aya: I want you to let me sing in today's show! I know that I've always had bad stage fright. I know I can't  deal with even the simplest of problems, but... I... I put in every last effort to make sure this show is a success! I'm making fewer and fewer mistakes, I'm singing parts I couldn't sing before... I'm gaining a confidence in myself that I never used to have... All the effort I've made that has carried me this far... it has made me who I am. Aya Maruyama. I don't have the talent. But I work extremely hard. And I don't want to see all my hard work go to waste. If you take that away from me, I have nothing left at all!
Chisato: ...
Aya: I... I am Aya Maruyama, Pastel✽Palettes! I want the people out there to see exactly who I am. So please, give me this chance! Please!
Staff: ... I mean, the show's about to start...
Eve: Aya-san has worked so hard for this! She has practiced more than any of us! I just know she can do it! Please...!
Maya: As a member of Pastel✽Palettes, and someone who wants to see the real Aya Maruyama out on that stage, I have to ask too! Please!
Hina: Yeah. I mean, Aya-chan's good now. She's not gonna fail out there... I know it.
Staff: You guys...
Chisato: We all know there is absolutely no room for mistakes up on that stage. We know there is a risk of Aya-chan getting stage fright again. We understand that.
Aya: ... You guys...!
Staff: ... Okay. Give me a moment. Let me talk to the event staff.
Aya: ...! Thank you!
Eve: That's sounds promising, Aya-san!
Aya: It does...! Thank you all so much!
Hina: I knew you'd bring a real sparkling solution to all this. I'm glad to see it worked out. Right, Chisato-chan?
Chisato: What are you talking about?
Hina: Hmm? Fufu. Never mind~.
Eve: Let's make this live show a complete success!
All: Yeah!

chapter_20.action: [Scene: Offstage]
Hina: We're up next~.
Eve: I'm so glad you get to sing, Aya-san!
Aya: M-me too! Yeah...
Hina: Uh-oh~. Your face is all stiffened-up. Like a rock. Are you all right, Aya-chan~?
Aya: A-ahaha... I'm sorry. I think I'm just a little... n-nervous...
Chisato: You really do get terrible stage fright, don't you? But I guess that's part of what makes you you.
Aya: A-ahaha... Yeah, it does make me me, I guess.
Staff: Pastel✽Palettes, get ready to go live!
Maya: Here it is...!
Aya: ... Come on. Let's go!
All Five: Okay!
[Scene: Onstage]
Aya: Hello everyone! We are...
All Five: Pastel✽Palettes!
Aya: Here is our first song of the show, "Shuwarin✩Dreaming"!
Maya: (She's a little stiff, but she's really singing it...! I think we're gonna be okay!)
Audience Member: Is she lip-syncing again?
Aya: ~~♪
Audience Member: ... Wait, that note was off just then. Maybe she is really singing this time!
Audience Member: They're really playing those instruments too. An idol group that actually performs like a band? That's amazing!

Aya: My name is Aya and I'm the vocalist of Pastel✽Palettes! Thank you all so much for coming today! But now... I'd like to make an apology. In our debut performance... we didn't really sing or play our instruments. We lied to our precious fans... and I just feel terrible. I'm really sorry, everyone! But for today's show, we've all been practicing really hard... and we are ready to perform for you completely live! We are all so happy that you've given us this second chance! Thank you all so much! We hope... I hope that you'll continue to support Pastel✽Palettes for years to come!
All Five: Thank you, everyone!
Audience Member: Yeah! Go Pastel✽Palettes!!
Audience Member: We're here for you, girls!!
Audience Member: Aya-chan~! You can do it~!! That one note was a little off, though~!
Aya: A-ahh... Hahaha... I mean, I did practice a lot, but... ... Ahaha...
Chisato: ... Hi, everyone. I'm the bassist, Chisato Shirasagi ♪ I'm so happy to see you all enjoyed our first real live performance today♪ Thanks to Aya-chan's beautiful singing, of course.
Aya: Wh-what?! Y-yeah... I guess... I mean, was that a compliment, though...?
Audience Member: That's so like Chisato! Trust a child actor to be that quick to the mark! We really felt your performance, guys~!
Chisato: We all still have a lot to learn, but we are getting there, step by step. We just hope that you'll be there to support us along the way ♪
Aya: (Chisato-chan... Did you do all this to help me...?)
Hina: Hey, you lot, out there in the dark~! I hope you're watching Hina-chan's amazing guitar skills, too~!
Eve: I want to show you all the way of bushido through my performance! I'll do my best!
Audience Member: Hahaha! Bushido? What does that mean?
Maya: I-I'm gonna try my hardest up here, too. Sorry, I'm... kinda nervous, huhehe... Ah, I did a "huhehe" again, didn't I...?
Audience Member: Who is that girl? She seems awesome! Call me a fan!
Audience Member: Me too! Pastel✽Palettes sure know how to pick 'em!
Aya: (Amazing... The whole event suddenly feels so different...!)
Chisato: So let's get back to our, of course 100% live, performance. Aya-chan, if you would be so kind.
Aya: O-okay! Here we go guys~!
[Scene: Dressing Room]
Eve: The whole audience looked so happy! Our show was a success!
Maya: It was! We were great out there! Aya-san really is a true idol, huh!
Aya: Y-you think so?

Maya: I always did. Idols are strong. They follow their dreams. They never give up. Watching you sing tonight... seeing the spotlight shine down on you... you sparkled brighter than I've ever seen before. A real, true idol!
Hina: Ahh~, she's crying again~!
Aya: O-of course I am~!!
Hina: Hahaha. Well, you earned it. You can cry all you like. We put on a great show today.
Aya: ... Chisato-chan.
Chisato: Yes?
Aya: It was thanks to you... thanks to all of you that I made it through the show today. ... Thank you so much.
Chisato: I didn't do anything. All I did was keep on believing in the Aya Maruyama that I know. And I'm glad I did. ... Thank you.
Aya: Chisato-chan...!
Eve: Chisato-san, Aya-san! Let's all have one big hug!
Aya: What?!
Eve: Time for a hug of true love! Because I love you all! The five of us, Pastel✽Palettes!
Chisato: Kya~?! E-Eve-chan...?!
Hina: Whoa, wait, me too~?!
Maya: Huhehe... Stop it, you're making me blush...
Aya: You guys... Thank you! As long as I have you all by my side, I think I'll always be able to keep on being me. Let's always stay together and follow our dreams all the way to the big stage!
